hero.title: Unlock Foreign VAT Refunds:
hero.description: Empower your business customers to claim back foreign Input VAT automatically and digitally. Our solution integrates seamlessly into your platform, providing a zero-effort, end-to-end recovery service.
hero.secondaryDescription: Boost customer loyalty, increase transaction volume, and offer a powerful new financial tool without administrative overhead for your bank.
hero.ctaText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation

platform.title: The VATGenius Platform
platform.description: A modern graphic showing data seamlessly flowing from your Neobank App Interface into the VAT Reclaim Engine

features.title: VATGenius Bank API
features.description: Easy integration with API for automated data transfer from your bank system. Captures, organizes, processes, and validates data from all the invoices and receipts of your business customers.

features.title: VATGenius Engine
features.description: AI-powered invoice compliance assessment, Calculate potential foreign VAT refund amounts, Request customer authorization automatically, Handle inquiries from foreign tax authorities, Real-time status display

features.title: VATGenius TAX API
features.description: Submits local and foreign VAT refund applications fully automatically and digitally to the tax portals of the relevant countries.

security.title: Security and Compliance
security.description: At VATGenius, implementing effective cybersecurity measures is fundamental to ensuring the protection of sensitive data and thereby securing the trust of our customers.
features: Encryption protocols and multi-factor authentication for access controls
Careful review of every aspect of data processing
GDPR compliant data storage and handling
